lessons.title: Welcome to Ruby! 💎
lessons.description: Discover what Ruby is and why developers love its elegant syntax.

lessons.title: Printing to the Screen 🖨️
lessons.description: Learn how to use puts and print to display output in Ruby.

lessons.title: Getting User Input 💬
lessons.description: Make your programs interactive by accepting input with gets.

lessons.title: Leaving Comments 📝
lessons.description: Learn how to document your code so humans can read it.

lessons.title: Everything is an Object 🧩
lessons.description: A quick look at Ruby's core philosophy: Everything is an object.
